text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I learned so much watching you two train!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The trust you both have in one another is
especially amazing!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, sorry to hold you up when you must be tired!
I'll see you later!
